title: 2x+ increased Alzheimer's risk, further genotyping suggested ; increased LDL cholesterol
summary: 2x+ increased Alzheimer's risk, further genotyping suggested ; increased LDL cholesterol
detail: By itself this SNP is associated with a 2x-3x increased risk of developing late-onset Alzheimer's disease. However suggests that this SNP really only serves as a proxy for the ApoE4 allele which has a larger risk increase. Since feedback from Promethease users suggests that this SNP may not be such an accurate proxy, you may wish to specifically verify your APOE allele status by checking genoset [http://snpedia.com/index.php/Gs216 gs216], which checks both rs429358 and rs7412, as well as any other APOE alleles described on the [http://snpedia.com/index.php/APOE APOE page].
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.
conditions: 2x+ increased Alzheimer's risk, further genotyping suggested

By itself this SNP is associated with a 2x-3x increased risk of developing late-onset Alzheimer's disease. However suggests that this SNP really only serves as a proxy for the ApoE4 allele which has a larger risk increase. Since feedback from Promethease users suggests that this SNP may not be such an accurate proxy, you may wish to specifically verify your APOE allele status by checking genoset [http://snpedia.com/index.php/Gs216 gs216], which checks both rs429358 and rs7412, as well as any other APOE alleles described on the [http://snpedia.com/index.php/APOE APOE page].
release: SNPedia cached page export; page timestamp 2014-02-25T00:25:21Z
notes: SNPedia is supplementary and should not be treated as a primary clinical source.
